summary.content: Software Engineer with 3+ years building data-intensive backend systems, ML pipelines, and API services on AWS. Proficient in Python, FastAPI, PySpark, and SQL with a track record of optimizing data pipelines for 30-40% latency improvements, deploying production ML services with 99.9% uptime, and shipping AI-powered applications that deliver measurable business outcomes. Strong foundation in software engineering principles with domain depth in data systems and applied AI.

experience.title: Founding Engineer, Data and AI Applications
experience.company: Alphonso AI, Shipley Center for Innovation
bullets: Architected and deployed a hybrid Dense Vector + BM25 retrieval system with Cross-Encoder reranking; optimized embedding strategies and scoring hyperparameters to deliver a 38% improvement in system precision.
Built end-to-end AWS data pipelines (S3, Glue) with automated feature engineering and Grafana drift monitoring, ensuring sustained reliability for production AI services.
Operationalized engagement-scoring models with funnel-analysis instrumentation, enabling continuous feedback loops and informing pre-launch product decisions.

experience.title: Graduate Equity Research Analyst
experience.company: Student Managed Investment Fund, Clarkson University
bullets: Engineered an automated financial data extraction pipeline via the SEC EDGAR API and Google Vertex AI, reducing manual processing time by 40% and enabling structured inputs for valuation models.
Built Monte Carlo simulation models and NLP-based sentiment analysis pipelines in Python to support investment decision-making for a $650K fund that delivered 51% total return.
Architected Tableau dashboards integrating LLM-generated earnings-call summaries, reducing analyst reporting overhead and accelerating investment committee reviews.

experience.title: Data Science and ML Consultant
bullets: Refactored PySpark ETL scripts processing 1M+ cross-channel events (GA4, CRM); implemented AWS Glue partition pruning to reduce pipeline latency by 30%, accelerating downstream model training.
Deployed CausalML and clustering models in production on AWS and instrumented A/B testing infrastructure with Power Analysis-based sample sizing, validating a 12% revenue-per-ticket improvement.
Built end-to-end behavioral analytics systems from data ingestion to stakeholder reporting, processing multi-source event data at production scale.

experience.title: Business Data Analyst
bullets: Developed and productionized a hybrid demand-forecasting model (Prophet + SARIMAX) across 1,500+ SKUs, improving forecast accuracy by 15% MAPE on approximately 800K daily Oracle ERP records.
Deployed GxP-compliant ML workflows on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure with real-time alerting and monitoring, maintaining 99.9% uptime for mission-critical inventory pipelines.
Automated KPI reporting pipelines via Oracle Analytics Cloud, eliminating 12+ hours per week of manual data preparation for the procurement team.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Engineered scalable PySpark and Databricks data ingestion pipelines processing 10M+ rows from 30+ heterogeneous sources, reducing data latency by 40% and improving pipeline reliability.
Built and maintained Power BI reporting dashboards enabling 10+ stakeholders to self-serve campaign performance data for multi-million-dollar investment decisions.
Applied regression modeling and sampling frameworks to generate consumer insights for 10+ FMCG and Telecom clients across Middle East and Central Africa markets.
